name: design-evidence
description: Extract design handoff zip, serve artifacts, and generate GitHub evidence comments
help:
Usage: /design-evidence --zip <path> [--screens <files>] [--issue <#>] [--repo <owner/repo>]

Examples:
  /design-evidence --zip shadcnui Design System-handoff.zip
  /design-evidence --zip design.zip --screens manager.html,index.html --issue 27
  /design-evidence --zip design.zip --issue 27 --repo Hassanjkhan99/shift-ledger

Options:
  --zip <path>          Path to design handoff zip (required)
  --screens <files>     Comma-separated HTML files to serve (default: manager.html,index.html,audit-export.html)
  --issue <#>          GitHub issue number to post comment to (optional)
  --repo <owner/repo>   GitHub repo (default: current repo)

Outputs:
  - Extracts design artifacts to docs/evidence/design-handoff-<timestamp>/
  - Generates COMMENT.md with GitHub-ready evidence
  - Starts local static server for viewing/screenshotting
  - Optionally posts comment to GitHub issue
